p.strong: Check pending → Look up handler → Route to action

g.text: KERNEL — Dispatch Engine (runs in kernel page table)

div.p: ⚠️ Must run before user page table switch! Kernel identity-maps all physical memory. User PT doesn't map kernel data structures.

ul.li: != NULL → user registered handler via sigaction()
== NULL → no handler, use default action
Only remove from queue if was READY

div.p: → deliver_signal() Rewrites trap frame to redirect execution to user's handler function (See Phase 5)
